title: Write CSV
description: Export an R data frame to a local CSV file.
problemStatement:
Persist your results! Export the data frame `df <- data.frame(a=1:5)` to a file named `output.csv` using `write.csv()`. 

**Requirement:** Set `row.names = FALSE` to avoid adding an index column.
expectedOutput: A file named output.csv is created in the working directory
